>> Issue: [B608:hardcoded_sql_expressions] Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

   Location: packages\backend\domain\cohort_analysis.py:41:12
40	    cohorts = await conn.fetch(
41	        f"""  # nosec
42	        WITH user_cohorts AS (
43	            SELECT
44	                u.id AS user_id,
45	                DATE_TRUNC('{date_trunc}', u.created_at) AS cohort_date
46	            FROM auth.users u
47	            WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '{num_periods} {interval.replace("1 ", "")}'
48	        ),
49	        activity AS (
50	            SELECT DISTINCT
51	                a.user_id,
52	                DATE_TRUNC('{date_trunc}', a.created_at) AS activity_date
53	            FROM public.applications a
54	            WHERE a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '{num_periods} {interval.replace("1 ", "")}'
55	        )
56	        SELECT
57	            uc.cohort_date,
58	            a.activity_date,
59	            COUNT(DISTINCT uc.user_id) AS active_users,
60	            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_cohorts uc2 WHERE uc2.cohort_date = uc.cohort_date) AS cohort_size
61	        FROM user_cohorts uc
62	        LEFT JOIN activity a ON a.user_id = uc.user_id
63	        GROUP BY uc.cohort_date, a.activity_date
64	        ORDER BY uc.cohort_date, a.activity_date
65	        """
